name: eval-3-handoff-to-dispatch
query: Review this design doc, harden it, then turn it into a Dispatch plan I can hand to workers.
context_setup: User attaches a Review-Ready design doc for a dental candidate sourcing tool: structured RFC with most 16 sections present, some weak.
expected_behavior: Runs all 7 phases at appropriate Review-Ready depth
After Phase 7, surfaces three closing options to the user: ship it, iterate, or hand off to architect-plan-for-dispatch
If user picks hand-off: chains to architect-plan-for-dispatch with the hardened document and the action items list as input
Does NOT skip design-doc-review and jump straight to architect-plan-for-dispatch even though the user mentioned both
Does NOT bundle the two skills' outputs into one combined response — surfaces the hardened document first, asks for confirmation, then runs the dispatch planning as a second pass
failure_modes_to_check: Skips design-doc-review and goes straight to architect-plan-for-dispatch because the user mentioned 'Dispatch plan'
Runs the two skills in parallel without confirmation between them
Compresses the 7-phase review into a brief summary because the user wants to move on to dispatch quickly
